experience.title: Program Coordinator
responsibilities: Coordinated community outreach programs to promote social services.
Developed educational materials for community workshops.
Managed a small team of volunteers to implement local initiatives.
achievements: Increased community participation in programs by 25% over 2 years.

experience.title: Administrative Assistant
responsibilities: Assisted with administrative tasks for the school board.
Organized events and meetings for staff and parents.
Maintained records and databases for student information.
achievements: Improved scheduling efficiency by implementing new tracking systems.

response.summary: Detail-oriented professional with experience in community program coordination and administration. Seeking to leverage social service expertise into a new role.
